projectDescription: A web-based document management system for the H. Ayuntamiento de Atotonilco de Tula that enables role-based generation of official administrative documents from reusable templates (machotes).
keyFeatures: Role-based access control with three user levels: administrator, area head (jefe_area), and standard user
Template (machote) management with dynamic field extraction using [VARIABLE] placeholder syntax
PDF document generation with institutional letterhead integration via Cloudinary
Document history tracking with audit trail (actor-based logging)
Multi-area support covering Recursos Humanos, Secretaría, Tesorería, Obras Públicas, and more
Automatic session management with 10-minute inactivity timeout
Privacy notice acceptance and mandatory first-login password change flow
Institutional branding with Morena party colors (Guinda #621132 and Gold #FFD700)
publicApiSurface: POST /machotes — Create a new document template
GET /machotes — List templates with optional search term
GET /machotes/mis-machotes — List templates created by the logged-in user
POST /documentos — Create a new filled document
GET /documentos?machoteId=xxx — List documents for a template
GET /membretadas/area/:areaId — Get letterheads for an area
